headline: Will W.W. Grainger (GWW) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: W.W. Grainger (GWW) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Otis to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What to Expect This Season
summary: OTIS heads into Q2 earnings with Service growth and modernization initiatives in focus as investors watch whether margin pressures weigh on results.
